title: Create: Animal Kingdom
description: Fabric based Create oriented modpack where Foxes and Polar Bears fight for control over the world. Will you help the Foxes and slay the Polar Bears, or dominate both for total control?
body:
In this world, the original villagers have long gone extinct and replaced by many different animal species. From this, two rival factions of intelligent animals emerged: The Foxes and the Polar Bears. They have adapted to all climates, and filled the world with their structures. Will you trade with the foxes and complete their bounties by crafting and placing bounty boards in villages, and maybe even automate their requests using Create? Will you fight the hostile Polar Bears and take over their lands, loot their chests and steal their weapons? Or will you make your own way in the world, explore the far away lands and build grand factories?

This modpack runs on Fabric, and contains all the common performance boost mods like Sodium to ensure compatibility with as many systems as possible. It overhauls the world, using a large combination of Mods, Data Packs and Resource packs to create a large and immersive world to explore. Contains a fabric port of Sophisticated Backpacks & Storage for your items, all the Create mods and addons you want and many different structure generation mods to make the world worth to explore. Heavily based on my two favorite resource packs, [We Don't Bite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wedontbite) and [Goat Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/goat-villagers), so huge shoutout to them.
